label: Steel — Korea (PLANiT MACC)
description: 16 BF/EAF facilities; fuel + feedstock blend groups; transitions to H2-DRI-ESF / EAF under a declining CO2 target and rising carbon price.

label: Shipping — fleet fuel mix
description: Fleet aggregated by engine class; fuel blend (bio / LNG / e-fuels) shifts within share bounds under a tightening well-to-wake CO2 target.

label: Petrochemicals — Korea (PLANiT MACC)
description: Process archetypes (Naphtha Cracker / BTX / Utility); naphtha crackers may switch to H2 or electric cracking under a Policy_Target CO2 path.
